positive: A whimsical and vibrant forest scene featuring stylized anthropomorphic woodland creatures (rabbits, foxes, deer) interacting playfully with glowing magical elements. The composition must be centered, with strong silhouettes and graphic outlines visible against a luminous, dark-teal and emerald green background. Style: Highly detailed, modern illustrative art with influences of Storybook fantasy and Japanese woodblock print aesthetics. Lighting: Dramatic contrast, rim lighting on subjects, and bioluminescent glow emanating from flora and magical particles. Composition: Rule of thirds applied to main subjects, negative space utilized around central motifs. Perfect for repeating apparel prints, vector-like crispness.
negative: text, blurry, noisy, artifacts, low resolution, watermarks, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, ugly, poor contrast, grayscale
